name: diagnosticLookup
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3 registerLensAction; dispatch key 'automotive.diagnosticLookup'). NOT assassin-enumerated — automotive registers via registerLensAction (LENS_ACTIONS), so the assassin's MACROS walk never drives it; this spec is the authored contract, pinned by server/tests/automotive-lens-macros.test.js. Reads code from data.code/data.dtcCode/params.code (case-insensitive, uppercased). Validates 1-letter (P/B/C/U) + 4 digits — anything malformed is REJECTED (fail-CLOSED on bad format, never a fabricated lookup). Known SAE J2012 codes return source 'sae-j2012'; unknown but valid codes return a grounded 'generic-sae-interpretation' (never invented causes/cost). Pure compute, no STATE, no network.
